_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: Similar results were observed in the human MPNST M3 cells, which also showed a high drug synergy for the trametinib and ripretinib combination treatment
details: Showed high drug synergy for trametinib and ripretinib combination treatment with left-shift of dose-response curves
